summary: Settings page with tabs, Dashboard charts, Costs Table, and Excel export features tested successfully. Fixed a bug in Dashboard.jsx where it was calling non-existent /api/costs/all endpoint instead of /api/reports/all-costs.

bugs_fixed.issue: Dashboard was calling /api/costs/all which doesn't exist
bugs_fixed.impact: Dashboard charts (bar, pie, area) were showing 'Aucune donnee' instead of actual cost data

context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page with 5 tabs (Apparence, Utilisateurs, Import, Taches planifiees, SSO) fully functional. Dashboard charts now display cost data correctly after bug fix. Excel export at /api/reports/export-excel works. Sidebar shows Parametres only for admin role.

settings_page.apparence_tab: PASS - Logo/company name, 6 color presets, custom colors, preview section
settings_page.taches_planifiees_tab: PASS - Shows crontabs list with add/run/delete buttons
settings_page.sso_tab: PASS - SSO toggle with provider/client_id/domain fields
settings_page.save_settings: PASS - Settings saved and sidebar colors update

crontabs_api.POST /api/crontabs/{id}/run: PASS - Admin can run crontab manually

dashboard.bar_chart: PASS - Cost breakdown by recipe (after fix)
dashboard.area_chart: PASS - Prix revient vs Prix vente (after fix)
dashboard.recent_recipes: PASS - Shows 5 recent recipes with prices

costs_table.table_display: PASS - Shows 5 recipes with all cost columns
